title: Competency source metadata
description: Provenance and repository-safety metadata for one competency source package.

source_type.description: The kind of material represented by the source package.

source_version.description: Repository version of the represented source material.

status.description: Review state of this repository source extraction.

repository_usage.description: The declared basis for representing the source in this public repository.

artifacts.description: Source artifacts that are permitted to be stored under this package's raw directory.

nonEmptyString.description: A string containing at least one non-whitespace character.

sourceId.description: A globally unique stable identifier for one source.

languageTag.description: A practical BCP 47-style language tag such as en, ru, or zh-CN.

nonEmptyStringArray.description: Unique source-declared terms; an empty array means the source does not declare this scope dimension.

provenance.description: Information identifying the represented source and version.

url.description: An absolute HTTP or HTTPS source URL.

version_label.description: The source's own version label, independent from source_version.

dateString.description: A calendar date written as YYYY-MM-DD.

scope.description: Optional source-declared scope terms without platform normalization.

artifact.description: A legally permitted file stored inside the source package's raw directory.

path.description: A repository-relative path below the package raw directory.

sha256.description: The lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 digest of the artifact.
